Variables.Name: bAnimRotationOnly
Variables.Description:
Indicates that only the rotation should be taken from the animation sequence and the translation should come from the USkeletalMesh ref pose. 
	 	Note that the root bone always takes translation from the animation, even if this flag is set.
	 	You can use the UseTranslationBoneNames array to specify other bones that should use translation with this flag set.

Variables.Name: TrackBoneNames
Variables.Description: Bone name that each track relates to. TrackBoneName.Num() == Number of tracks.

Variables.Name: LinkupCache
Variables.Description: Non-serialised cache of linkups between different skeletal meshes and this AnimSet.

Variables.Name: BoneUseAnimTranslation
Variables.Description:
Array of booleans that indicate whether or not to read the translation of a bone from animation or ref skeleton.
	 	This is basically a cooked down version of UseTranslationBoneNames for speed.
	 	Size matches the number of tracks.

Variables.Name: UseTranslationBoneNames
Variables.Description: Names of bones that should use translation from the animation, if bAnimRotationOnly is set.

Variables.Name: ForceMeshTranslationBoneNames
Variables.Description: List of bones which are ALWAYS going to use their translation from the mesh and not the animation.

Variables.Name: PreviewSkelMeshName
Variables.Description: In the AnimSetEditor, when you switch to this AnimSet, it sees if this skeletal mesh is loaded and if so switches to it.

Variables.Name: BestRatioSkelMeshName
Variables.Description: Holds the name of the skeletal mesh whose reference skeleton best matches the TrackBoneName array.
